testcase.name: registerAccount

failure.message: expected [Congratulations! Your new account has been successfully created!] but found [If you already have an account with us, please login at the login page.]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Congratulations! Your new account has been successfully created!] but found [If you already have an account with us, please login at the login page.] at tests.RegisterTest.registerAccount(RegisterTest.java:40) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 31 stack frames

testcase.name: testMethod
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at tests.RegisterTest.testMethod(RegisterTest.java:76) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 29 stack frames
